meta.description: An identifiable single arrest or detention by law enforcement. When police, military, or other authorities capture or detain one or more individuals. Each arrest is a specific occurrence distinguishable by its location and date — not a general overview of law enforcement activity. Extracted from news articles and social media.

example.description: Federal police arrested three suspects linked to a drug trafficking network in a residential area.
example.context: The operation was part of a larger investigation that has been ongoing for several months.
example.detainee_description: tres hombres de entre 25 y 35 anos
example.charges: trafico de drogas, portacion de arma de fuego
example.seized_items: armas de fuego, vehiculos, sustancias ilicitas

event_type.description: Type of law enforcement action. Choose the single most specific category that matches.

status.description: Status of the arrest/detention as reported.

name.description: Name of the operation if it has one, e.g. 'Operacion Enjambre'. Usually null.

description.description: Brief description of the arrest or detention.

context.description: Contextual information: related investigations, crime context, political implications.

relevance.description: Relevance within the article: 1 = main topic, 2 = secondary, 3 = implicit.

date_range.description: Date or date range of the arrest or detention. Extract the start datetime and, if present, the end datetime.

location.description: Location where the arrest or detention took place.

detainee_count.description: Number of people detained or arrested, with original text mention and parsed count.

detainee_description.description: Description of detained persons (age, gender, affiliation), if mentioned.

charges.description: Charges or alleged crimes, if mentioned.

arresting_authority.description: Law enforcement body that made the arrest (e.g. 'Policia Federal', 'Guardia Nacional', 'Ejercito').

seized_items.description: Items seized during the operation (weapons, drugs, vehicles, cash), if mentioned.

related_crime.description: The crime that led to the arrest, if mentioned (e.g. 'homicidio del 15 de agosto').
